description_long: This is a rugged, rectangular hard-shell toolbox with a dark, matte finish, designed for durability and protection of tools. The exterior features reinforced edges and corners, providing extra impact resistance. On the front side, there are two robust latches and a central folding handle, all made from the same dark plastic as the body, ensuring secure closure and easy portability. The surface is slightly textured, likely to improve grip and reduce slipping. The box appears to be made primarily of molded plastic, with no visible metal reinforcements or external compartments. There are no visible logos, labels, or decorative elements, giving it a utilitarian and professional appearance.
description: A sturdy, dark plastic toolbox with reinforced edges, dual latches, and a central folding handle. Its matte, textured finish and simple, functional design make it ideal for urban tool storage.
description_view_0: The rear view shows the plain, reinforced back panel with no visible handles or latches.
description_view_1: The front view displays two prominent latches and a central folding handle, highlighting the main access point.
description_view_2: The opposite rear view mirrors the back, showing a plain, reinforced surface without interactive features.
description_view_3: The front-latch view shows the latches and handle from a slightly different angle, emphasizing the secure closure mechanism.
attribute_handle_type: Single central folding handle, rectangular in shape, made of molded plastic, fixed to the front side for carrying; no visible ergonomic padding or telescopic features.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Two front-facing plastic clasp latches, snap-type, integrated into the body with no visible keyholes or combination locks.
attribute_compartment_configuration: No internal or external compartments, trays, or dividers are visible or implied from the exterior; likely a single large internal compartment.
